LanguageData.AM_AScompFD.description: Four bulletproof plates firmly protect the dress. Use four fourth level PE plates for protection, keeping its weight within an acceptable range. Due to being too bulky, flak vests cannot be worn anymore. Integrated with some tactical vest features, providing a bulletproof level of power armor.
LanguageData.AM_AScompFD.label: composite assault dress
LanguageData.AM_MK4aConcealed.description: A rig equipped with bulletproof armor plates. Its lightweight model can be concealed underneath an outer garment, providing effective protection for the entire upper body.
LanguageData.AM_MK4aConcealed.label: armored concealed rig
LanguageData.AM_MK4aDefensive.description: A rig equipped with bulletproof armor plates. Its heavy-duty structure can provide effective protection but does not protect the legs.
LanguageData.AM_MK4aDefensive.label: armored defensive rig
